description_long: This is a light beige bucket hat with a wide, downward-sloping brim and a flat-topped, cylindrical crown. The hat features a subtle stitched texture along the brim, giving it a slightly ribbed appearance. On one side of the crown, there is a small, centered daisy flower graphic with white petals and a yellow center, adding a touch of decorative charm. The rest of the hat is plain, with no visible branding or additional embellishments. The material appears to be a soft, flexible fabric, likely cotton or a cotton blend, suitable for casual urban wear. The overall design is simple, functional, and stylish, making it ideal for sun protection in parks, streets, or other outdoor urban environments.
description: A beige bucket hat with a flat crown, wide stitched brim, and a daisy flower graphic on one side. The hat is made of soft fabric and is unbranded, with a simple, casual style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the plain beige crown and the wide, stitched brim with no visible decorations.
description_view_1: Side view featuring the daisy flower graphic centered on the crown, with the brim's ribbed texture visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain beige crown and brim, with no decorations or graphics.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to the front, showing only the plain crown and brim without the daisy graphic.
